## 🔍 HOW TO USE THIS INDEX

### If You Are...

#### 👔 Project Manager
1. Read: `ETAP1_ENTRY_POINT.md` (2 min)
2. Review: `ETAP1_STATUS_REPORT.md` (5 min)
3. Check: `ETAP1_VISIBILITY_DASHBOARD.md` (10 min)

#### 👨‍💻 Developer
1. Start: `ETAP1_ENTRY_POINT.md` (2 min)
2. Learn: `ETAP1_MIDDLEWARE_REFACTOR_GUIDE.md` (15 min)
3. Deep dive: `MIDDLEWARE_CACHING_TESTING_CANON2026.md` (30 min)
4. Execute: `ETAP1_CHECKLIST.md` + scripts (2-3 hours)

#### 🚀 DevOps Engineer
1. Read: `ETAP1_QUICKSTART_RU.md` (5 min)
2. Review: `ETAP1_COMMANDS_RU.md` (10 min)
3. Execute: Scripts in order (2-3 hours)
4. Verify: `generate_final_report.php` output

#### 🏗️ Architect
1. Review: `ETAP1_MIDDLEWARE_REFACTOR_GUIDE.md` (20 min)
2. Deep dive: `MIDDLEWARE_CACHING_TESTING_CANON2026.md` (1 hour)
3. Verify: CANON 2026 compliance (checkpoints in guide)

#### 🧪 QA Engineer
1. Learn: `MIDDLEWARE_CACHING_TESTING_CANON2026.md` - Testing section (30 min)
2. Test: All 5 middleware via Feature tests (1-2 hours)
3. Verify: Test coverage > 95%

#### 📚 New Team Member
1. Start: `ETAP1_ENTRY_POINT.md` (2 min)
2. Follow: `README_ETAP1_INSTRUCTIONS.md` (15 min)
3. Study: `ETAP1_MIDDLEWARE_REFACTOR_GUIDE.md` (30 min)
4. Reference: `MIDDLEWARE_CACHING_TESTING_CANON2026.md` (ongoing)
